message:
fix: improve robustness across multiple modules

- bundler/install: stricter skill ID validation (security hardening)
- cli/commands/search: robust UTF-8 handling in snippet extraction
- core/packing: try_improve iterates all candidates (better optimization)
- graph/skills: case-insensitive capability matching and label normalization
- security/acip: regex patterns handle variable whitespace
- security/command_safety: minor cleanup

All changes preserve existing tests and add new test coverage.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
